THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER POLLOCK, RUSSELL D. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT MK ENTERPRISES, INC., DBA RABNAK ENTERPRISES, INC KANBAR, MAURICE S. PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD , CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PETITIONER POLLOCK, RUSSELL D. SERVED APR-23-2013, MAIL AS TO RESPONDENT KANBAR, MAURICE S. INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE MAURICE S. KANBAR REVOCABLE TRUST UNDER AGREEMENT DATED JUNE 7, 2001

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER RUSSELL POLLOCK'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 12, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MAY 14, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-12-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER RUSSELL POLLOCK'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: RUSSELL D. POLLOCK, ESQ., 415.981.1400, PETITIONER IN PRO PER; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER RUSSELL POLLOCK's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. judgment signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-14-2013 Continued To Jun-12-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER RUSSELL POLLOCK's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is continued to June 12, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 14, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
